recentArticles.title: How Michael Jackson’s Estate Has Quietly Funded His Three Kids' Lavish Lifestyle - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # How Michael Jackson’s Estate Has Quietly Funded His Three Kids' Lavish Lifestyle. Michael Jackson’s estate has turned out to be a lucrative blessing for his three kids, and the legal documents are proving where the money is going. Paris Jackson, 28, is currently engaged in a legal battle with the executors of her late father’s estate, John Branca and John McClain, over alleged mismanagement of funds, lack of transparency, and high attorney fees, per *New York Post*. In October 2025, Paris was accused of “[blowing through [money] faster than Michael ever did,](https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/celebrity/articles/paris-jackson-reportedly-blowing-her-205341464.html)” according to Rob Shuter’s *Naughty But Nice* Substack. Branca and McClain shared in legal documents, obtained by *Us Weekly*, Paris “has benefited more than anyone” from the lucrative Jackson estate, and they are frustrated that she’s pushing back. There is still no resolution in the Jackson family estate case, but it appears Paris is leading the fight with her brothers quietly showing support behind the scenes.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於麥可·傑克森的遺產管理及其子女的法律糾紛，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Now cancer-free, 'Roastmaster' comic Jeff Ross still finds humor in loss - npr.org
recentArticles.snippet: **'Roastmaster' comic Jeff Ross finds humor in loss** **Known for his ruthless celebrity roasts, Ross turns inward in his Netflix special, *Take a Banana for the Ride*, which details the loss of his parents and grandfather.**. "Going bald is one thing, but people thinking that I was sick or weak, for some reason, that really bothered me," Ross says of being diagnosed with alopecia. Comedian Jeff Ross — aka the "Roastmaster General," who's participated in televised roasts of celebrities like Justin Bieber, Tom Brady and Joan Rivers — is not easily offended. But his new Netflix comedy special, *Take a Banana for the Ride,* is more personal and autobiographical.In it, he reflects on his family and childhood — including the loss of his mother, who died of cancer when he was a teen, and his father, who died of an aneurysm five years later. To him, it was like a tough guy's way of saying, "I love you.

recentArticles.title: Why The Meta $6M Verdict Is A “Joe Camel” Warning For Big Tech - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # Why The Meta $6M Verdict Is A “Joe Camel” Warning For Big Tech. ## By Tyler Chou, Esq. I was halfway across the world in Taiwan for Spring Break when the Meta $6M verdict broke: a Los Angeles jury had delivered a $6 million verdict against Meta and Google in a case involving social media’s impact on a young user’s mental health. As an attorney for the world’s largest creators, I view this ruling not as a financial hit, but as a structural shift in the legal landscape—one that mirrors the fall of Big Tobacco. How the Meta 6M Verdict Reshapes The Creator Economy. ### What Leaders Should Do Now. As the legal landscape shifts from "Fast" to "Slow," creators and brands should audit their strategy:. The path from immunity to accountability following this Meta $6M verdict is now clearly marked; the only question is how quickly the rest of the industry will be forced to walk it.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson’s Album And Song Both Return To Their Chart Peaks - uk.news.yahoo.com
recentArticles.snippet: Michael Jackson may be referred to frequently as the King of Pop, but when it comes to the *Billboard* charts, he typically appears on rankings dedicated to R&B music. This frame, one of Jackson’s albums and a beloved single both find their way back to their all-time highs on different R&B charts. “Billie Jean” is Jackson’s only hit song that is present on any *Billboard* chart this frame, looking specifically in America. The tune lives on the R&B Digital Song Sales ranking, which reports the bestselling R&B-only tracks throughout the U.S. This time around, “Billie Jean” dance one space from No. 8 to No. 7, returning to its previously-set peak position a little under a year into its time on the tally. His *Number Ones* compilation, just like “Billie Jean,” steps up a single spot – from No. 7 to No. 6 – on the Top R&B/Hip-Hop Albums tally. While “Billie Jean” is only present on one U.S.-based chart, *Number Ones* occupies a spot on half a dozen rosters.

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Breaks Silence Amid U.K. Music Festival Backlash - huffpost.com
recentArticles.snippet: The rapper said he hopes to "present a show of change, bringing unity, peace, and love through my music" when he performs in London this summer. Ye, the rapper formerly known as Kanye West, has spoken out for the first time about the controversy surrounding his upcoming performances at the Wireless music festival. Among the most vocal critics of the Wireless booking were numerous leading UK-based Jewish groups, London mayor Sadiq Khan and even UK prime minister Keir Starmer, who said it was “deeply concerning that Kanye West has been booked to perform at Wireless despite his previous antisemitic remarks and celebration of Nazism.”. The organizers of Wireless have also defended the choice to keep Ye as their headliner for 2026, with managing director Melvin Benn saying: “Forgiveness and giving people a second chance are becoming a lost virtue in this ever-increasing divisive world and I would ask people to reflect on their instant comments of disgust at the likelihood of him performing (as was mine) and offer some forgiveness and hope to him as I have decided to do.”.

recentArticles.title: Ella Langley’s ‘Choosin’ Texas’ Hits No. 1 on Billboard Canadian Hot 100 After Six Month Climb - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: After a six month climb, Alabama country star Ella Langley’s hit “Choosin’ Texas” has hit No. 1 on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100, dated April 11. The rising Canadian star’s track “Kingdom of Fear” arrives at No. 73, weeks after he debuted with his first-ever love song, “You and Me.”. While his apology hasn’t won over U.K. authorities— resulting in the cancellation of Wireless Festival, which Ye was set to headline — the provocative artist has continued his chart dominance, debuting at No. 2 with **Bully** on the Billboard Canadian Albums chart — his first solo release in four years. A few spots down, **RAYE**’s This May Contain Hope arrives at No. 10, one spot higher than her placement in the U.S. It follows the success of her cheekily honest song “Where Is My Husband!,” which hits a new peak at No. 5 on the Canadian Hot 100, while “Click Clack Symphony,” rises 79-63, following its debut last week.

recentArticles.title: R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Rjtheweirdo, Sekou, Lazer Dim 700, Marlon Craft & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Rjtheweirdo, Sekou, Lazer Dim 700, Marlon Craft & More. Listen to new must-hear songs from R&B/hip-hop artists like S! Ye quickly stole the weekend’s headlines from Pooh, thanks to his new *Bully* album, which opened at No. 2 on the Billboard 200 behind BTS’s *Arirang*, and its accompanying pair of SoFi Stadium shows in Los Angeles. With Fresh Picks, *Billboard* aims to highlight some of the best and most interesting new sounds across R&B and hip-hop — from a disco-infused Sekou to a new Lazer Dim 700 banger. Bridging elements of synth-pop, disco, and R&B, Sekou’s robust, chest-y voice reverberates across Cirkut and M-Phazes’ bass-driven soundscape with lyrics like, “It’s 2:00 a.m., and I’m waiting up for you/ If I want trouble, you’re really not hard to find/ Regret kicked in from the moment I called you.” Equal parts playful and cautious, Sekou casually dropped a springtime bop that can comfortably live on both R&B and pop playlists.

recentArticles.title: All of Ye’s Solo Albums Ranked From Worst to Best: Critics’ Picks - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: As one of the century’s premier hitmakers and influential artists invading music’s A-list, ranking West’s albums has been a passionate discussion among hip-hop fans for two decades, and *Billboard*‘s Michael Saponara and Armon Sadler will be adding to that with the list here. *The Life of Pablo* was an ever-changing set of music in multiple ways: Ye repeatedly switched the title ahead of its official release and continually updated the music, even adding songs, for months after it hit DSPs. Nonetheless, the album was such a flex between the star-studded cast of features and records that matter to the culture to this day. (Credit to him for obliging to the traditional four-year structure of a college career, by the way.) Beyond that, he showed he was ready for the real world by taking his abilities to yet another level: Pick the five best songs from any album throughout history and match them up against “Stronger,” “Good Life,” “Can’t Tell Me Nothing,” “Flashing Lights,” and “Homecoming.” The games may be close, but if this were a seven-game series, it may end like the Golden State Warriors sweeping the Cleveland Cavaliers in the 2018 NBA Finals.

recentArticles.title: Paris Jackson’s Brother Blanket Failed in Attempt to Intervene in Estate Battle - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Paris Jackson’s Brother Blanket Failed in Attempt to Intervene in Estate Battle. ## Paris Jackson’s Bro Blanket's Team Failed in Attempt to Intervene In Battle With Estate. **Paris Jackson**’s little brother, **Blanket "Bigi" Jackson**, and his legal team were apparently unsuccessful in their attempt to resolve her bitter battle with their late father’s estate ... Michael’s estate executors, **John Branca** and**John McClain**, called out Paris for backing out of a deal they say was recently reached between the executors and Jackson's children. Paris has been fighting the executors over certain payments made by the estate to third-party law firms that she felt were excessive, and has been pushing for a better process in court for approval of such payments. In new docs, the estate said they were close to an agreement with Paris -- after Blanket and his legal team spearheaded an effort to resolve the issues. The executors claim Blanket’s lawyer told them he spoke for all three of Michael’s children -- including Paris and Blanket’s brother, **Prince Jackson**.

recentArticles.snippet: # Wireless Festival Promoter Defends Kanye West as Headliner as Sponsors Pull Out, Asks Brits’ ‘Forgiveness’ for Rapper’s ‘Abhorrent’ Past Statements. Melvin Benn, who serves as managing director at Festival Republic, the U.K. promoter behind Wireless, issued a statement to *Variety* on Monday defending Ye based on his own experiences dealing with people who suffer from mental health issues. He called Ye’s previous declarations about Jews and Hitler “abhorrent,” but that they are “not giving him a platform to extol opinion of whatever nature” but only to perform songs that are “enjoyed by millions.” “Forgiveness and giving people a second chance are becoming a lost virtue in this ever-increasing divisive world,” he stated, “and I would ask people to reflect on their instant comments of disgust at the likelihood of him performing (as was mine) and offer some forgiveness and hope to him as I have decided to do.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導Wireless Festival主辦方為Kanye West辯護，儘管贊助商撤回，並呼籲大眾給予Kanye第二次機會。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Reportedly Rakes in $33 Million During His 2 Comeback Shows - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: ### Savannah Guthrie Delivers Easter Message Amid Mom's Disappearance. ### 'Age of Attraction's Derrick Fleming Dated Cast Member Post-Filming, Denies It Was Serious. ### Kardashians Go All Out With Massive Easter Baskets. # Kanye West Reportedly Rakes in $33 Million During His 2 Comeback Shows. ## Kanye West Just Call Me The Comeback Kid ... Bloomberg says Ye snagged more than $18 million in ticket sales during his Friday concert alone, making it one of the highest grossing single shows in the history of live music. But Bloomberg cautioned Ye's two sold-out L.A. gigs could just be an aberration considering all of his issues involving antisemitism dating back to 2022. But now, some of those corporations, are giving Ye a second chance, namely Spotify and RapCaviar, according to Bloomberg. In addition, Ye's L.A. shows were publicized by hip hop mogul Rod Wave's company, which partners with Live Nation, the world's biggest concert promoter.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於Kanye West的復出演唱會收益，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Coachella Announces Set Times, With Jack White as Surprise Last-Minute Addition - variety.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Coachella Announces Set Times, With Jack White as Surprise Last-Minute Addition. Set times for the first weekend of performances this Friday through Sunday were finally posted late Monday night, allowing the world to know exactly when headliner Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber and Karol G will take the stage, on top of dozens of other artists. The unveiling of the itinerary revealed one surprise in the lineup, as well: an appearance by Jack White… not in a headliner slot, or anything even close to it, but rather a 45-minute Mojave Tent performance smack in the middle of Saturday afternoon, at 3 p.m. He’s set to perform at 11:25 p.m. on the festival’s hump night. The most wooden performance of the festival — arguably — will take place Friday at 2:55 p.m. Arrive late enough to miss this historic appearance and you might as well just turn around and go home.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了Coachella音樂節公布演出時間表，並提及Jack White作為驚喜嘉賓，但未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West’s ‘Bully’ Debuts at No. 2 on Albums Chart as BTS Holds Top Spot With ‘Arirang’ - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West’s ‘Bully’ Debuts at No. 2 on Albums Chart as BTS Holds Top Spot With ‘Arirang’. The K-pop group’s latest album “Arirang” holds steady at No. 1 on the albums chart with 187,000 equivalent album units, down 71% from its opening week with 641,000. Last week, “Arirang” became BTS’ seventh No. 1 album and scored the biggest sales week for an album by a group in over a decade. ### David Zaslav to Receive More Than $550 Million in Compensation Related to Warner Bros.-Paramount Merger. Meanwhile, Ye’s “Bully” enters the chart at No. 2, becoming his 14th album to hit the top 10. (“Donda 2,” his last solo album, was deemed ineligible to chart in accordance with Billboard’s bundling guidelines.). ### Popular on Variety. Elsewhere on the chart, Melanie Martinez bowed at No. 3 with “Hades,” which earned 84,000 equivalent album units to become her fourth project to crack the top 10. ## More from Variety.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要報導Kanye West和BTS的專輯榜單表現，未提及周杰倫相關資訊。

recentArticles.title: Ye Just Made $33 Million in Two Nights. Will His Comeback Last? - Bloomberg.com
recentArticles.snippet: The most influential recording artist of the century, Ye was once one of the highest-paid acts in the music business. Corporate America’s patience ran out in 2022 when Ye talked about going “death con 3 on Jewish people.” A couple months later, he expressed admiration and affection for Hitler. Yet while Ye’s music didn’t violate Spotify’s hate speech policy, the streaming service didn’t exactly push his songs. It wasn’t just corporate America that wrestled with Ye. His behavior forced his millions of fans to determine if they could separate the art from the artist. Ye’s most recent albums haven’t sold as well as the blockbusters, and his touring business was nonexistent. Yet while there are some people who will never forgive Ye, it’s clear that there are millions of people around the world who still want to engage with his work. For those who know Ye, the question isn’t whether he can keep himself stable for long enough to put out an album or play a couple of shows.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於美國藝人肯伊·威斯特（Ye）的復出及其爭議，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

周杰倫近日話題不斷，公開了英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片，引發熱議。其「嘉年華II」巡演首站杭州場吸引5萬人，首唱7首新歌，並斥資5億打造14公尺巨型機甲，場面震撼。Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。
周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演於杭州盛大開唱，不僅首唱7首新歌，更出動14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬粉絲狂嗨。他公開英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片引發熱議，女主播分析求婚細節更顯珍貴。此外，Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。
周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演杭州站盛大開唱，首度獻唱7首新歌，並動用14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬歌迷狂歡。他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的珍貴影片，單膝下跪的畫面引發熱議。此外，Spotify也推出周杰倫專屬「16包廂」互動體驗，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。
今日周杰倫新聞焦點：他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的感人影片，引發熱議。同時，「嘉年華II」世界巡演於杭州盛大啟動，現場5萬名歌迷狂嗨，更出動14公尺巨型機甲。此外，Spotify推出周杰倫專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。
